data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of safe separation between simulation and actual execution. While the linked use case demonstrates the dry-run functionality, it does not provide explicit evidence that the system ensures a clear distinction between simulated actions and actual changes. The evidence indicates that the dry-run can preview consequences, but it lacks confirmation that this separation is enforced in practice, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: The evidence does not confirm that the system enforces a safe separation between simulation and actual execution.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
